channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: MTS boosts Trolley service for Padres Opening Weekend
item.description: The Friar Faithful will be taking over downtown San Diego on Thursday and into the weekend as the Padres take on the Atlanta Braves, marking the first home games of the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ed Lenderman, Fox 5

item.title: Bay Area’s Alysa Liu takes surprise lead at figure skating world championships, capping her sensational return to the sport
item.description: Almost three years after stepping away from the sport, Richmond native Alysa Liu is on the verge of winning a world championship title in stunning and unlikely fashion.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: WNBA legend reveals 1-word reaction to JuJu Watkins' devastating knee injury
item.description: USC Trojans women's basketball JuJu Watkins's devastating knee injury led to a one-word reaction from WNBA and college basketball legend Sue Bird.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Opening day is here: Juan Soto debuts, Paul Skenes vs Sandy Alcántara, and more
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Juan Soto, Blake Snell and Clay Holmes debut for new teams, Paul Skenes makes his first opening-day start at age 22 and Sandy Alcántara returns from Tommy John surgery.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Numbers to know for each of the 16 teams remaining in March Madness
item.description: (AP) - The smaller the number, the larger the impact at this year’s NCAA Tournament. Arkansas, the No. 10 seed in the West Region, is the only double-digit seed still alive heading into the regional semifinals. All four No. 1 seeds and three of the four No. 2 seeds are still standing.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pirates star Paul Skenes' strikeouts to help Gary Sinise Foundation for 2nd straight season
item.description: Pittsburgh Pirates star pitcher Paul Skenes will strike out batters for a good cause for a second straight season, donating $100 for each K to the Gary Sinise Foundation
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: White Sox Opening Day: A lot of 'new' on the South Side in 2025. What to know if you're headed to Rate Field
item.description: CHICAGO — After a 2024 season that everyone would rather forget, there's a lot of "new" on the South Side as the White Sox get set to embark on their 2025 campaign Thursday. There's a new manager, Will Venable. There's a new stadium name, Rate Field. There's a new food and beverage menu.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Lakers’ LeBron James addresses confrontation with ESPN’s Stephen A. Smith
item.description: During an extended interview on the “The Pat McAfee Show,” James says the polarizing Smith “completely missed the whole point” of why he approached him during a game earlier this month.
item.dc:creator: Khobi Price, The Mercury News

item.title: NBA teams set to hear more about league's plans for future European involvement
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — NBA teams will be briefed Thursday on the league's ongoing quest to further align with FIBA and expand its role in European basketball. The briefing will be part of the day's session at the league's Board of Governors meeting.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees kick off opening day with home game against Brewers
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – It's baseball's opening day on Thursday and the New York Yankees are kicking off the season with a home game against the Milwaukee Brewers.
item.dc:creator: Kala Rama, PIX 11

item.title: What battle for Final Four spot would mean for Michigan-Michigan State basketball rivalry
item.description: History is on the line for the Michigan State Spartans, led by Naismith Basketball Hall-of-Fame head coach Tom Izzo, and the Michigan Wolverines, led by Dusty May, if they can clinch a Final Four spot.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Jokic gets a triple-double in his return to lead Nuggets past Bucks 127-117
item.description: Nikola Jokic had 39 points, 10 rebounds and 10 assists in his first game back in nearly two weeks to lead the Denver Nuggets to a 127-117 victory against the Milwaukee Bucks.
item.dc:creator: Craig Meyer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: American figure skater Alysa Liu takes the lead on the opening night of the world championships
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Alysa Liu rarely wavers when it comes to anything, whether it be her abrupt decision to retire after the 2022 Winter Olympics, or the American figure skater's similarly stunning decision to announce her comeback early last year.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: UConn's Dan Hurley expresses regret over postgame remarks that were caught on camera
item.description: UConn coach Dan Hurley acknowledged there are things that “I wish I didn’t do” as he expressed regret over making profane comments about the officiating after the Huskies’ NCAA Tournament loss to Florida.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Newly signed Russell Wilson says he expects to be the Giants' starting QB this upcoming season
item.description: Russell Wilson joined the New York Giants with every intention of being under center when the regular season begins.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cowboys' Dak Prescott gets caught up in wild trade rumor weeks before draft
item.description: Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott was the subject of a wild trade rumor involving the Cleveland Browns on Wednesday ahead of the NFL Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: USF Football spring game features street fest & halftime alumni game
item.description: TAMPA (USF) - The USF Spring Game returns to Corbett Stadium on the USF Campus on Sat., April 26 and will feature a street fest outside the stadium and the always popular alumni flag football game at halftime.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ex-NFL player charged after 190 dogs seized from Oklahoma dog fighting venture
item.description: An Oklahoma man is facing federal charges after officials seized 190 dogs from an animal fighting venture, according to court documents.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz get crushed by Memphis, 140-103
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Just when you think things can sink any lower for the Utah Jazz, they get outscored by 38 points in the second half in a 140-103 blowout loss to the Memphis Grizzlies Tuesday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sam Merrill has found a home in Cleveland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a homecoming for former Bountiful High and Utah State star Sam Merrill Sunday night. Merrill hit a couple of three-pointers in his return to his home state in Cleveland's 120-91 win over the Jazz. Merrill says loves playing in front of family and friends.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Late boxing legend George Foreman had deep ties to this East Bay city
item.description: (KRON) -- Boxing legend and former heavyweight champion George Foreman died last Friday at the age of 76. Foreman was born in Texas. However, after a troubled upbringing, he then moved to the West Coast after ninth grade when he enrolled in President Lyndon B. Johnson's Job Corps work program.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Power conferences box out 'Cinderella' for the first time
item.description: The Sweet 16, a popular destination for bracket-busting mid-majors, will be made up entirely of teams from power conferences, a first since the bracket expanded to 64 teams in 1985.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU fans celebrate Sweet 16 bid with Cougars
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Hours after BYU pulled out a 91-89 thriller over Wisconsin to advance to its first Sweet 16 since 2011, hundred of diehard BYU fans showed up at Provo Airport at 1:30 in the morning to welcome the conquering heroes back from Denver. "What a game!" said one BYU fan.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: March Madness: No. 2 UConn routs Arkansas State 103-34 in opener as Fudd has 27 points
item.description: After the Red Wolves’ Crislyn Rose scored the game’s first basket in the NCAA Tournament first-round game, UConn ripped off the next 22 points en route to a convincing 103-34 victory on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: JIM FULLER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sweet 16: Calipari guides Arkansas past Pitino, St. John's 75-66 for 16th trip to regional semifinal
item.description: John Calipari is heading to the Sweet 16 for the 16th time, and this one could be the sweetest of all.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU will have hands full with Wisconsin
item.description: DENVEER (ABC4 Sports) - If BYU is going to get to its first Sweet 16 since 2011, the Cougars are going to have to deal with one of the powers of the Big Ten Conference, #13 Wisconsin.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Oakland Roots sell over 24K tickets to Coliseum home opener
item.description: (KRON) -- The Oakland Roots Soccer Club have sold over 24,000 tickets to their home opener on Saturday. The team, which will make its debut Saturday at the iconic Oakland Coliseum, is already set to smash its previous attendance record.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: BYU shuts down VCU in NCAA Tournament, 80-71
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - The last time BYU played in the NCAA Tournament in Denver in 2011, they made it to the Sweet 16. The Cougars are now one win away from going back.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
